# NIP-71 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
NIP-71 defines video events with kinds 21 (normal) and 22 (short). Addressable versions use kinds 34235 (normal) and 34236 (short) with a 'd' tag for updates. Required tags for addressable events include 'd' (unique identifier) and 'title'. Other tags include 'published_at', 'text-track', 'content-warning', 'alt', 'segment', 't' (hashtag), 'p' (participant), and 'r' (reference). The 'imeta' tag specifies video metadata, including 'duration' and 'bitrate'. Example:
```json
